title: Creating Capacity View Based Off Multiple Task Boards
excerpt:

posts.author: Jasonfm79 (Jason Martinez)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am need some help at creating a board. I am fairly new, so I apologize if this has been posted or asked sometime in the recent past.

I have 5 employees who all have their own boards. Everyone’s board is almost 99% the same. I want to create a master board that can import everyone’s board info, and I can create a workload view so we can see our team’s capacity each week.

I really liked the My Work option, but I could only see my tasks from my board, as well as those of our two contractors we work with, who’s board were shareable. I could not see those of my teammates, even though I am a board owner on each board.

Any guidance would be super helpful!

Thank you!
